column6: baseline: faithful Python port of computeVatReturn() from A1-Localization-AM@src/vatReturn.js. round_amd() uses half-toward-+∞ to match JS Math.round() exactly. All 20 cases match JS byte-for-byte (outputVat/inputVat/taxableSales/taxablePurchases/net/payable/creditCarried). No bugs to fix — agent's job is to ADD capabilities (warnings, audit trail, multi-period).
